# neon_organization_members (Data Source)

Retrieves the list of members for a Neon organization.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "neon_organization_members" "example" {
  org_id = "your-organization-id"

  query = {
    sort_by    = "email"
    sort_order = "asc"
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `org_id` (String) The Neon organization ID.

### Optional

- `query` (Attributes) Query parameters for filtering and sorting members. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--query))

### Read-Only

- `members` (Attributes List) The list of organization members. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--members))

<a id="nestedatt--query"></a>
### Nested Schema for `query`

Optional:

- `sort_by` (String) Sort members by the specified field. Possible values: `email`, `role`, `joined_at`. Defaults to `joined_at`.
- `sort_order` (String) Sort order. Possible values: `asc`, `desc`.


<a id="nestedatt--members"></a>
### Nested Schema for `members`

Read-Only:

- `email` (String) The member email address.
- `has_mfa` (Boolean) Whether the member has MFA (TOTP) enabled.
- `id` (String) The member ID.
- `joined_at` (String) A timestamp indicating when the member joined the organization, in RFC 3339 format.
- `role` (String) The member role. Possible values are `admin` or `member`.
- `user_id` (String) The user ID.
